overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit urban area transitioning from a commercial plaza with the Imperia Mall into the Pacifica Slums, ending in a dark underpass lit by firelight. The scene features cyberpunk aesthetics with holographic billboards, burning vehicles, and makeshift tent settlements.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with burning vehicle and neon signage

events.description: passing the burning car on the right, smoke temporarily obscures the view
moving from the open plaza into the narrower street corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit commercial district, passing a burning vehicle on the right

entered.detail: tall commercial building with vertical neon signage and 'IMPERIA MALL' lettering
vehicle engulfed in flames with thick smoke rising
tall holographic advertising displays with colorful neon graphics

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide commercial plaza at night, dominated by the Imperia Mall building with bright vertical neon signage. A burning car sits on the right side of the frame emitting thick smoke. The camera moves forward through the neon-lit environment, passing the burning vehicle and transitioning into a street corridor lined with palm trees and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street transitioning to slum district

events.description: entering the Pacifica Slums district as indicated by on-screen text
surroundings become more decrepit with tents and makeshift structures appearing along the roadside

agents.ego_description: continuing up the inclined street into the slum area, passing various digital billboards and street signs

entered.detail: street sign reading 'Pacific Blvd' mounted on a pole
makeshift canvas shelters and temporary housing structures
red and white striped construction barriers

segments.scene_description: The camera progresses up a sloping street away from the commercial plaza. Digital billboards line the right side while the environment gradually deteriorates. At 16 seconds, the 'PACIFICA SLUMS' text appears as makeshift tents and decrepit structures become visible along the roadside, marking the transition into a disadvantaged neighborhood.

scene_state.functional_zone: Pacifica Slums with makeshift housing and overhead transit structure

events.description: approaching the concrete overpass structure that spans the street ahead
ambient light decreases significantly as approaching the dark underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating through the slum area with tents and debris on both sides, approaching a dark underpass beneath the overhead walkway

entered.detail: elevated transit walkway with concrete pillars spanning across the street
purple neon sign with stylized text mounted on the overpass structure
orange metal barricades blocking off a section of the street

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the Pacifica Slums, the street becomes lined with tents and makeshift shelters on both sides. A large concrete overpass with a purple 'bahia' neon sign looms ahead. The camera passes yellow metal barricades and palm trees while the environment grows darker approaching the underpass entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass beneath transit structure with firelight illumination

events.description: entering the dark underpass where fire pits become the primary light source
moving deeper into the enclosed underpass area with makeshift shelters and campfires

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark underpass beneath the overpass, illuminated by warm firelight from makeshift camps on the sides

entered.detail: burning fires providing warm orange illumination in the darkness
thick support columns holding up the overpass structure
covered encampments with tarps and cardboard beneath the overpass

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the dark underpass beneath the concrete overpass, where the environment becomes enclosed and dimly lit. Fire pits provide the primary warm orange illumination, revealing makeshift shelters and debris scattered along the concrete walkway. The segment ends as the camera continues through the shadowy corridor beneath the transit structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit commercial plaza into the decaying, shadow-filled depths of the Pacifica Slums. It begins in a wide plaza dominated by the bright vertical signage of the Imperia Mall, moving past a burning car emitting thick smoke as it enters a street corridor lined with palm trees and digital billboards. As the camera progresses up a sloping road, the polished urban environment gradually deteriorates, shifting from commercial displays to the makeshift tents and decrepit structures of a disadvantaged neighborhood. The scene then deepens into a corridor of shelters and yellow metal barricades before approaching a looming concrete overpass marked by a purple neon sign. Finally, the camera enters the dark underpass, where the bright city lights vanish and the environment becomes an enclosed, shadowy walkway illuminated only by the warm orange glow of scattered fire pits.
